description_long: This is a two-seater sofa upholstered in a dark material, likely leather or faux leather, with a plush, soft appearance. The seat is covered with a bright red throw blanket and a white pillow, adding a pop of color and a cozy, lived-in feel. A small dog is sitting on the left side of the sofa, further emphasizing its domestic use. Behind the sofa, a large multi-panel wall art depicting a city street scene is mounted on a pale blue wall, contributing to an urban, homey atmosphere. The sofa has a low backrest and appears to have wide, slightly rounded armrests, though the right side is partially obscured. The legs are not clearly visible, suggesting they may be short or recessed, giving the sofa a grounded, stable look.
description: A dark, two-seater sofa with a red throw and white pillow, featuring a low backrest and wide armrests, set against a city-themed wall art.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sofa's seat, red throw, white pillow, and a small dog, with the cityscape wall art above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the draped red throw, and the layered cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the sofa and the full cityscape wall art, with minimal sofa detail visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sofa's side profile, the red throw, and the arrangement of cushions and pillow.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two main seat cushions and two back cushions, all appearing attached and uniform in size, with additional loose pillows and a throw blanket on top.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, slightly rounded armrests at both ends, padded and at seat height, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not clearly visible, likely short or recessed, possibly block-style and made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with attached cushions, straight profile, no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark upholstery with a smooth, matte finish; no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
